title: calceolaria poikilanthes
intro: Calceolaria poikilanthes, also known as the 'poetic fairy', is a flowering plant species native to Peru and Ecuador. This plant is rich in flavonoids and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calceolaria poikilanthes include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Calceolaria poikilanthes can be found in infusions, extracts, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy among traditional herbalists.
